channel.title: Technology | The Indian Express
channel.description: Latest News Today: Breaking News and Top Headlines from India, Entertainment, Business, Politics and Sports

item.title: Google unveils new prompt engineering playbook: 10 key points on mastering Gemini, other AI tools
You really don’t need a more powerful computer…you just need the MacBook Air M4
item.dc:creator: Nandagopal Rajan

media:content.media:title: The MacBook Air M4 comes in 13-inch and 15-inch screen sizes, features a new 12-megapixel Center Stage camera, and offers up to 18 hours of battery life.

The Mac Studio with M4 Max features up to a 16-core CPU, up to a 40-core GPU, over half a terabyte per second of unified memory bandwidth, and a Neural Engine that is over three times faster than the M1 Max.
The new DeskView option lets you show what’s on your desk.
The new MacBook Air M4 comes with a 12MP camera that supports 1080p video recording and Center Stage.
